Effective inventory management ensures that companies can meet customer demand without overstocking or understocking, which directly impacts

60.30.description: In some organizations, customer service dictates the outbound processing and in others, warehouse operations. Customer service is close to the customer, and the warehouse is close to the inventory. Either can decide what is the best inventory to ship and it might vary from one facility to another.
